properties.name: Stigfjorden + Mollösund (water_quality AOI v4)
properties.description: AOI defined as a WGS84 rectangle whose four corners, when projected to EPSG:3006, produce a parallelogram whose axis-aligned bounding box is EXACTLY the desired 10 m-snapped EPSG:3006 rectangle (283340, 6439270, 307590, 6449200). The WGS84 corners were solved iteratively (4 fixed-point iterations) so that transform_bounds(WGS84 → 3006) — i.e. the inflation step inside _to_nmd_grid — produces the target 3006 bbox with zero residual. No bypass of _to_nmd_grid; the rectangle itself is the fix.
covers: Stigfjorden (inner fjord between Tjörn and Orust)
Coastal waters off Käringön and Gullholmen

history.change: v2 → v3: shifted bbox south to Marstrand area; user-supplied via bbox_picker
v3 → v4: adapted WGS84 rectangle so transform_bounds(WGS84→3006) produces clean axis-aligned 3006 rect (eliminates parallelogram tilt without bypassing _to_nmd_grid)

target_3006_rectangle.comment: This is what _to_nmd_grid produces from the WGS84 bbox above — verified zero residual.
